title: My Deathbed Goals
content:
My Deathbed Goals
(What do I want to be remembered for? What experiences must I have? What impact do I want to leave? Who do I want to have become?)

Answer: I want be remembered for getting through this life and figuring something out. Accomplishing something greater than my mortal self. To have broken free of my own chains. To have lived a life that led to the ultimate goal of feeling accomplished.


My 10-Year Goals
(What major milestones do I want to achieve in the next decade in my career, relationships, health, and personal growth?)

Answer: In the next decade, I want to be on a set path that I don’t dread, career wise. I want to live my life in stability, in good health, and feel financially secure, I want to continue to figure out answers to questions of life, existence, and the universe. I want to know more. I will have peace with my family. I want to have meaningful connections that I feel secure in. A circle or a person that feels like home.
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 2 (chunk 2/29)
